query:
SELECT 
  c.id AS claim_id,
  c.claim_number,
  LEFT(c.incident_description, 200) AS description_preview,
  LEFT(c.normalised_description, 200) AS normalised_preview,
  c.incident_type,
  c.vehicle_make,
  c.vehicle_model,
  c.vehicle_year,
  c.status,
  c.created_at
FROM claims c
WHERE c.incident_description IS NOT NULL 
  AND c.incident_description != ''
ORDER BY c.created_at DESC
LIMIT 20;
